ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A secure hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the motion sequence */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the motion sequence */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the sequence was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, project manager)
A secure hash of the user's password
The timestamp when the user account was created
The timestamp when the user account was last updated
A boolean indicating whether the user account is active
The timestamp of the user's last login

Foreign key referencing the motion sequence
The timestamp when the sequence was approved
The status of the approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected)
